top.title: Pope criticises 'tyrants' who spend billions on wars after Trump spat
top.summary: The comments follow a high-profile spat with US President Donald Trump, who called the Pope weak on crime.

top.title: Turkish police detain 162 people over online praise for school shootings
top.summary: At least 16 people were injured in a shooting at a high school on Tuesday, before another nine were killed in a separate school shooting on Wednesday.

top.title: Ex-keeper Manninger dies after car hit by train
top.summary: Former Arsenal goalkeeper Alex Manninger dies at the age of 48 after his car is struck by a train.

top.title: Things can't go on like this with online safety, Starmer tells tech bosses
top.summary: It comes as the government continues to consult on whether to ban under-16s from social media in the UK.

top.title: Booking.com customers warned of 'reservation hijacking' after hack
top.summary: The travel platform said it had changed Pins to protect customers but would not say how many were affected.

top.title: Google to punish sites that trap people in with back button tricks
top.summary: The tech giant said it will punish sites that block back button navigation from June.
